Petitioner Coupons.Com Incorporated'S Motion To Tax Respondents' Costs
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Coupons.Com Incorporated'S Motion To Tax Respondents' Costs - Judge Kahn previously heard this matter and took it under submission. That ruling was vacated because he was unavailable. Judge Kahn is now available and the matter is re-submitted without further argument. No appearances are necessary and a ruling will be issued forthwith. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Off Calendar Jun-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
RESPONDENTS HELLMAN & FRIEDMAN, LLC AND HELLMAN & FRIEDMAN CAPITAL PARTNERS VI, L.P.'S Motion To Seal Portions Of Confidential Documents Submitted In Response To First Amended Petition To Compel Arbitration as to Respondent HELLMAN & FIEDMAN, LLC AND RELATED ENTITIES IS GRANTED. Ntc Of Hearing On First Amended Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael L. Wang, Esq., and Neil A. Goteiner, Esq., from Farella Braun + Martell LLP, 415-954-4400, for Petitioner and moving
Evette Penny Packer, Esq., and Claude M. Stern, Esq., from Quinn Emanuel Trial Lawyers, 650-8010-5000, for Respondent and opposing party

Argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER COUPONS.COM INCORPORATED'S First Amended Petition To Compel Arbitration is Denied without prejudice. Petitioner has not met its burden to compel arbitration of the non-signatory respondents based on either equitable grounds or the alter ego doctrine. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
